items.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
applied_rule_notes: tooling surface + author ecosystem + awesome/plugin refs → upgrade pressure toward adopt
items.why: Concrete tooling surface with repeated ecosystem references, adjacent author projects, and clear practical utility.

items.name: gsd-build/get-shit-done
applied_rule_notes: methodology/framework signal → strong follow, not direct adopt by default
items.why: Signal remains interesting, but the extra targeted evidence is not yet strong enough to justify an upgrade.

items.name: Gog
applied_rule_notes: strong support but unclear reusable lesson → keep follow
items.why: Well-supported skill, but the reusable product lesson remains less clear than browser/search/summarize style capabilities.

items.name: Proactive Agent
applied_rule_notes: behavior-layer capability + canonical ecosystem support → upgrade toward adopt-candidate
items.why: Proactive execution remains strategically relevant; if stronger canonical references exist, it should move closer to adopt.
